seo.title: Team Beachbody Events Summit
seo.description: Team Beachbody events summit will push your limits during these one-of-a-kind supertrainer-led workouts, created exclusively for our Coach events. Sign up here!

data.descriptionShort: Head to toe mind/body workout Beachbody style.
data.descriptionLong: Push your limits during these one-of-a-kind supertrainer-led workouts, created exclusively for our Coach events. But don’t wait around, some of them will only be available for a limited time so start sweating now.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpDjk.title: Elise Joan's Exclusive 2021 Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpDjk.descriptionLong: Sculpt a firm, rounded booty and a Slimer, more defined body using small, targeted movements, high reps, and isometric holds in Elise’s signature fusion of Pilates, ballet barre, and cardio interval training.

trainers.bio:
"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpGTY.title: Joel Freeman's Exclusive 2021 Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpGTY.descriptionLong: This all-out cardio meltdown is designed to torch calories and increase strength, power, and muscular endurance in around 30 minutes—no weights required.

trainers.bio: Joel Freeman is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of top programs like LIIFT MORE™, 10 Rounds™, and LIIFT4®. For 20 years, he’s helped people crush their fitness goals and unlock their athletic potential.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpI6i.title: Idalis Velasquez's Exclusive 2021 Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpI6i.descriptionLong: Turn your dumbbells into muscle-building calorie blasters with multiple rounds of strength exercises designed to tighten and define your entire body.

trainers.bio: Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of BODi's Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30-Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpO52.title: Autumn's NLC 9WCF Off The Wall
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpO52.descriptionLong: You’ll work your back and biceps—and burn fat all over—with density training, a strength complex, and Tabata. We call it DCT-T, and it’s your ticket to the body you’ve always wanted.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpfFw.title: Chalene Johnson's Exclusive Piyo Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpfFw.descriptionLong: Chalene helps you build strength and improve flexibility by combining powerful lower & upper body moves that simultaneously work your core.

trainers.bio: High-energy Chalene turns her lifelong love of health and fitness into exciting, challenging workouts that scorch calories and burn fat. Her results-driven programs inspire people to reach for hardcore results without straining their bodies. When you’re ready to sweat, Chalene is ready for you.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQptIe.title: Leandro Carvalho's Exclusive Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQptIe.descriptionLong: No one can get your glutes in tip top shape better than Leandro Carvalho. Easy to follow cardio moves, and targeted lower body strength exercises will leave you feeling amazing.

trainers.bio: An acclaimed professional dancer, Leandro’s studied approach to movement and aesthetics give his programs a unique, results-driven angle. He’s been profiled in major fashion and fitness magazines and featured on top entertainment and news TV shows. His fitness programs are known all over the world.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpw7s.title: Shaun T's Exclusive Stacked Summit Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQpw7s.descriptionLong: This combination of new and classic Shaun T moves will show you why he is the king of crushing calories. Be sure to have a towel, cuz you are going to SWEAT!

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Shaun T has helped millions of people get in the best shape of their lives with his transformational fitness programs. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.

purchaseOptions.title: BODi Membership Required
purchaseOptions.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQqCzo.title: The Super Workout
BoGK5VlBLllbPFYTvQqCzo.descriptionLong: Each Beachbody Super Trainer brings you their unique style coaching through a variety of training formats including yoga, body weight training, strength training, muscle building, cardio and MORE! This all inclusive Super Workout will leave you feeling amazing.

trainers.bio: He’s one of the most influential yoga teachers in L.A., and one of the most sought-after instructors in the world. He’s been practicing yoga for 15+ years and is a pioneer in the modern yoga movement. A mathematician by training, he mixes precision and exactness in everything he does.

Debbie has been a leading fitness expert for over 20 years. She’s been featured on numerous TV programs to talk about fitness, health and staying in shape. She thrives on helping motivate people to find discipline, and balance mind, body, and spirit to achieve their healthy living goals!

Tony has revolutionized the fitness world by helping millions of people get ripped and get healthy with his total-body workouts. He’s collaborated with BODi on some of our biggest programs, pushing people all over the world to work towards their own extreme body transformations.

High-energy Chalene turns her lifelong love of health and fitness into exciting, challenging workouts that scorch calories and burn fat. Her results-driven programs inspire people to reach for hardcore results without straining their bodies. When you’re ready to sweat, Chalene is ready for you.

An acclaimed professional dancer, Leandro’s studied approach to movement and aesthetics give his programs a unique, results-driven angle. He’s been profiled in major fashion and fitness magazines and featured on top entertainment and news TV shows. His fitness programs are known all over the world.

Jericho McMatthews’ passionate approach to fitness empowers you to own your health, wellness, and happiness. She’s a NASM and ACE certified personal trainer and holds degrees in psychology as well as physical education and kinesiology.

Joel Freeman is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of top programs like LIIFT MORE™, 10 Rounds™, and LIIFT4®. For 20 years, he’s helped people crush their fitness goals and unlock their athletic potential.

Super Trainer Autumn Calabrese is the creator of 4 Weeks For Every Body™, 21 Day Fix® and as well as other breakthrough fitness programs, the nutrition program The 4 Week Gut Protocol®, FIXATE®, and the Portion Fix® eating plan. She’s a certified holistic health coach through the Institute of Integrative Nutrition and has held certifications from NASM and AFPA.

Amoila Cesar is a NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape. Along with CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, he’s also the creator of 645®, 6 Weeks of THE WORK® and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. He’s led millions worldwide, from professional athletes, A-list celebrities, and CEOs to mothers, entrepreneurs, and more through their fitness journey.

Two-time Mr. Israel is more than a big, buff guy. He’s an expert on how the human body operates. He’s appeared in thousands of bodybuilding magazines and had been on the cover of Muscle & Fitness an amazing 11 times. He’s a Master Professional Personal Trainer and an IFBB Propta Hall of Famer.

Idalis is an NASM certified personal trainer and creator of BODi's Spanish-language workout program Mes de Más® and 30-Day Breakaway®, a running and resistance training program designed to get you 5K-ready in record time. Take her live strength, cardio, core, and cycling classes to start sculpting a slimmer, stronger, more athletic body today!

Super Trainer Shaun T has helped millions of people get in the best shape of their lives with his transformational fitness programs. He is the mastermind behind BODi megahits such as FOCUS T25, Transform :20, INSANITY, CIZE, and LET’S GET UP! Whether you’re new to fitness or a lifting veteran, his powerful, positive, results-driven classes will help you become stronger, leaner, and more confident. Shaun will push you to work your hardest and show you just how much you’re capable of.

"Super Trainer Elise Joan is the creator of the fitness programs BODi LAVA, Barre Blend, Pre & Post Natal Barre Blend, and co-creator of 3 Week Yoga Retreat and FIRE AND FLOW. She’s a former professional dancer and has created programming in all genres of fitness—from barre and yoga to cycling and strength. In addition to being certified in the Science of Well-Being through Yale University, Elise prioritizes mental health and internal wellness, along with the physical results she’s known for.
"

Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

NWOt1I2xWP7xm05A7w5W4s.descriptionLong: You’ll need resistance loops and dumbbells for this intense interval workout that targets your arms and core while giving you a full-body burn. Keep a towel and water bottle handy—you’ll want both as you grind through multiple rounds of exercises.

trainers.bio: Jennifer Jacobs is an NASM certified personal trainer, nutrition coach, and fitness nutrition specialist, as well as a certified indoor cycling instructor through Schwinn and the AFAA. Known for her functional training workouts, Jennifer will help you stay accountable and unleash your best self.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZL2kyl.title: Megan Davies' Exclusive #mbf Summit Workout
Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZL2kyl.descriptionLong: Here is your sneak peak at Megan's new program #mbf! Push yourself to lift heavier and crush this head-to-toe workout that leaves no muscle untouched.

trainers.bio: Super Trainer Megan Davies is an NSCA certified personal trainer and creator of #mbf Muscle Burns Fat, #mbfa Muscle Burns Fat Advanced, and Sure Thing. After appearing on BODi’s fitness reality show, THE 20s, Megan became the next Super Trainer and created Clean Week. Her passion for learning about physiology, health, fitness, and technique fuels every program she creates. Her down-to-earth, empowering workout style and upbeat personality make you feel like you’re training with a best friend.

Q6j5eG7tj3PSUghmZL2s7b.descriptionLong: Amoila has you tackle three blocks of six intense, muscle-burning exercises that target your entire body. Get ready to WORK.

trainers.bio: Amoila Cesar is a NASM and ISSA certified personal trainer famous for getting professional athletes in seriously good shape. Along with CHOP WOOD CARRY WATER, he’s also the creator of 645®, 6 Weeks of THE WORK® and 4 Weeks of THE PREP™. He’s led millions worldwide, from professional athletes, A-list celebrities, and CEOs to mothers, entrepreneurs, and more through their fitness journey.
